name: embedagents
description: STM32 development by talking to Claude — wraps ST's vendor tools (STM32CubeMX, STM32CubeIDE, STM32CubeProgrammer, ST-LINK gdbserver, STM32 Signing Tool) plus a USB serial reader, as five slash commands and the `stm32` CLI they drive.
